title: syneilesis subglabrata
intro: Syneilesis subglabrata, also known as the false hawthorn or yellow corydalis, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Syneilesis subglabrata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Syneilesis subglabrata is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its herbal preparations may also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
